signOff.notes: Do not approve until signed IPA export and TestFlight evidence are attached.

checks.scenario: Ignored AppConfig.xcconfig uses production bundle ID, real Apple Team ID, and production APNs environment
checks.notes: Verified bundle ID com.fanzone.fanzone, Apple Team ID 63STJ5N27W, and APNs production.

checks.scenario: Production GoogleService-Info.plist is present and matches the production iOS app
Production Release archive succeeds with signing enabled
Signed App Store Connect IPA export succeeds
Signed build installs and launches on a physical iPhone
Production push permission, delivery, and notification tap routing are verified on iPhone
Build uploads to App Store Connect and is available in TestFlight internal testing
App Review notes, privacy labels, screenshots, support URL, privacy URL, and terms URL are ready
